name: Pearl Drop Earrings
description: Fresh-water pearl drops suspended from a slender 18kt gold wire. Effortlessly elegant for office meetings or candlelight dinners. The naturally lustrous pearl is hand-picked for uniform sheen.
careInstructions: Pearls are delicate. Keep away from acids, perfumes, and chlorine. Wipe with a damp cloth after wearing.
shipping: Ships within 2–3 business days. Free shipping on orders above ₹1000.
returns: Returns accepted within 7 days in original, unworn condition with intact packaging.
